nasb.text: So Joshua made a covenant with the people that day, and made for them a statute and an ordinance in Shechem.

esv.text: So Joshua made a covenant with the people that day, and put in place statutes and rules for them at Shechem.

cnv.text: 那一天，約書亞就與眾民立約，在示劍為他們訂立律例和典章。

ccb.text: 当天约书亚与民众立约，在示剑为他们订立律例和典章。
